name: default-vnet
description: Default VNet template for MCI dynamic provisioning. Uses a CSP-agnostic policy (2 subnets, multi-zone). CSP-specific constraints are applied automatically at provisioning time: IBM is capped to 1 subnet, NCP subnets are placed in the same zone, GCP omits VPC-level CIDR. CIDR blocks are auto-assigned per connection index to avoid conflicts.
